title: Board that only shows items mirrored from other boards
excerpt: Is it possible to have a board with only mirrored items? My use case is that I want to summary items from several different boards that have a certain status (‘blocked’). Is that possible?

posts.author: Joesoes (Johan Jönsson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to have a board with only mirrored items? My use case is that I want to summary items from several different boards that have a certain status (‘blocked’). Is that possible?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: There is no concept of mirroring items, you can mirror columns from items in other boards. Each item in each board is unique, but with mirrored columns they can show the same information (except for the item name). Hope that makes sense.

posts.author: Joesoes (Johan Jönsson)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. Maybe a dashboard is more suitable? Not sure if that’s possible though.
